title: ARCHIVED Drug and health product establishment licence holder emergency contact form - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED Emergency Contact Information Form
This HTML document is not a form. Its purpose is to display the information as found on the form for viewing purposes only. If you wish to use the form, you must use the alternate format below.
Health Products and Food Branch Inspectorate Graham Spry Building, 2nd Floor 250 Lanark Avenue Address Locator #2002A OTTAWA, Ontario K1A 0K9
As per section C.01A.005 (b) of the Food and Drugs Regulations , you are requested to submit in writing your emergency contact information (24/7 or after business hours).
Please include the requested information with your 2012 annual review documents.
Emergency Contact Information (24/7 or after business hours)
Establishment Licence Number:
